name: Felix Shumba
bio: Artist and cultural practitioner. Felix founded Paivapo Institution to create a space where knowledge, art, and ecology converge. His work will be represented at the Venice Biennale 2026.

name: Community Librarian
bio: Position opening March 2026. Our librarian will be the heart of the institution — managing the collection, hosting reading groups, and welcoming all visitors.

name: London Coordinator
bio: Managing book donations, shipping logistics, and UK-based partnerships from our London support office.
